subcodes.first_line: O thou trusted and faithful Amini! Thy letter dated the twenty-second of Shawwal of this year hath been received, and from its contents the utmost gladness and joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امینی الامین نامه بیست و دوم شوال سنه حالیه رسید و از مضمون نهایت انشراح و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @suffering and imprisonment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise of Western values; culture, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
